name: Podcasts
description: Manage podcast subscriptions with automatic RSS feed updates, episode downloads, auto-delete after listening, and daily auto-playlist generation.
overview: Subscribe to podcast RSS feeds, automatically download new episodes, manage auto-deletion of listened content, and generate a daily auto-playlist of unlistened episodes.

versions.changelog:
- Alpha release
- RSS feed subscription management
- Configurable update frequency (daily, weekly, monthly)
- Auto-download of new episodes
- Cover image extraction as folder.jpg
- Auto-delete after 2 days of listening
- Daily auto-playlist generation in Jellyfin XML format
- Manual feed update buttons
- Podcast detection via playback events

- Fixed: Feed validation now uses server-side API (no CORS issues)
- Fixed: All form buttons (Validar feed, Guardar, Cancelar) have consistent styling
- Fixed: Auto-playlist checkbox is now interactive
- Improved build process to ensure embedded resources are up to date

- Fixed: All buttons now use native Jellyfin styling (emby-button, raised, button-submit)
- Fixed: Action buttons (Borrar, Actualizar, Actualizar Todos) now execute correctly
- Fixed: Using native confirm() for reliable cross-version compatibility
- Fixed: Event delegation for dynamically rendered feed list buttons
- Fixed: API calls use fetch with X-Emby-Token for reliable authentication
- Improved: Feed list uses Jellyfin listItem component for native look and feel

- Fixed: Native Jellyfin button styling with CSS fallback (raised + button-submit)
- Fixed: Checkbox with Jellyfin accent-color styling
- Fixed: Select dropdown with dark background (no white flash)
- Fixed: Auto-delete now defaults to '2 dias despues de escuchar'
- Fixed: Feed info shows 'Frecuencia:' and 'Borrado:' labels
- Fixed: Only downloads latest 10 episodes per podcast
- Improved: Explicit CSS for consistent cross-version styling
